Crafting_1.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998: NSLOCTEXT("", "33342BCB452F402CD0E47D86FFA3DAA5", "The Crafting Bench allows you to manufacture useful items, including the Mining Explosives you need to progress. Interact with the Crafting Bench and click the Crafting Panel button in the Info Panel to begin. Plans for items available for crafting are shown, along with their required materials. You can Pin a plan to the left side of the screen with (RMB) in order to keep track of the required materials. Click the Plan you'd like to craft to start the process. Click multiple times to add items to the Queue. Items you have available for use as crafting materials are shown in the right-hand inventory panel. This list includes all items in your own inventory, as well as anything in storage facilities anywhere within your Outpost. Items will be automatically taken from any available inventory, starting with your own, when a Plan is added to the Queue. Items created via Crafting will be placed in the Inventory of the Crafting Bench.")
